testsuite.name: com.example.stockconsumer.ConsumeTest

testcase.name: 읽어오고 나서 다시 올릴 때 어떯게 올리가는지 객체 확인하기

testsuite.system-out:
14:35:23.238 [Test worker] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.example.stockconsumer.ConsumeTest]: ConsumeTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 14:35:23.272 [Test worker] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.example.stockconsumer.StockConsumerApplication for test class com.example.stockconsumer.ConsumeTest 14:35:23.298 [Test worker] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.example.stockconsumer.ConsumeTest]: ConsumeTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 14:35:23.299 [Test worker] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.example.stockconsumer.StockConsumerApplication for test class com.example.stockconsumer.ConsumeTest
